samples.title: Butter Chicken
steps: Pour the water into a large pot and add the potatoes, butter, pepper, and salt
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to simmer, and cook for 20 minutes until tender
Drain the potatoes, and mash with a potato masher
Add the milk and butter; mash until smooth
Serve
samples.formatted:
Butter Chicken

Ingredients:
- water
- potatoes
- salt
- butter
- black pepper
- milk

Instructions:
1. Pour the water into a large pot and add the potatoes, butter, pepper, and salt
2. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to simmer, and cook for 20 minutes until tender
3. Drain the potatoes, and mash with a potato masher
4. Add the milk and butter; mash until smooth
5. Serve

samples.title: Butter Chicken
steps: Dissolve bouillon cubes in water
Add the flour and cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until mixture thickens
Add cheese; stir until melted
Add salt and pepper
Stir in milk
Cook until hot
samples.formatted:
Butter Chicken

Ingredients:
- chicken bouillon cubes
- water
- flour
- Cheddar cheese
- milk
- pepper
- salt

Instructions:
1. Dissolve bouillon cubes in water
2. Add the flour and cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until mixture thickens
3. Add cheese; stir until melted
4. Add salt and pepper
5. Stir in milk
6. Cook until hot

samples.title: Butter Chicken
steps: Preheat oven to 375 degrees
Grease a pie pan
In a mixing bowl, beat together first 5 ingredients until smooth
In a separate bowl, combine sugar, cinnamon, vanilla, 1/2 teaspoon salt
Stir into pumpkin mixture
Transfer to pie pan
Bake until a knife blade inserted in the middle comes
samples.formatted:
Butter Chicken

Ingredients:
- flour
- eggs
- milk
- pumpkin
- sugar
- butter
- pecans
- cinnamon
- vanilla
- salt

Instructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees
2. Grease a pie pan
3. In a mixing bowl, beat together first 5 ingredients until smooth
4. In a separate bowl, combine sugar, cinnamon, vanilla, 1/2 teaspoon salt
5. Stir into pumpkin mixture
6. Transfer to pie pan
7. Bake until a knife blade inserted in the middle comes

samples.title: Butter Chicken
steps: In a small bowl, combine the flour, baking powder and salt
In another large bowl, beat the egg, milk, oil and vanilla
Add to dry ingredients and stir just until moistened
Transfer to a greased 9-in. square baking dish
Bake at 325 for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean
In a small bowl, combine the sugar and cinnamon; sprinkle over batter
samples.formatted:
Butter Chicken

Ingredients:
- flour
- cinnamon
- sugar
- baking powder
- salt
- egg
- milk
- canola oil
- vanilla

Instructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the flour, baking powder and salt
2. In another large bowl, beat the egg, milk, oil and vanilla
3. Add to dry ingredients and stir just until moistened
4. Transfer to a greased 9-in. square baking dish
5. Bake at 325 for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean
6. In a small bowl, combine the sugar and cinnamon; sprinkle over batter
